title: The Descent of Inanna to the Underworld
description: The goddess Inanna descends through seven gates, stripped of her power at each one, to confront her sister Death.
introduction: The goddess Inanna descends through seven gates, stripped of her power at each one, to confront her sister Death.

translation.original_text: From the great above she opened her ear to the great below. From the great above the goddess opened her ear to the great below.
